Triton Database — Backups and Restore

Triton Database backups run as snapshots of the columnar storage files plus the schema catalog. Scheduled snapshots run hourly, daily, and weekly. Restore from snapshot rebuilds the database to the snapshot timestamp; point-in-time recovery replays the write-ahead log forward from the most recent snapshot. Triton Database backups capture the columnar storage files plus the schema catalog. Triton Database restore replays the write-ahead log forward from the most recent snapshot for point-in-time recovery.
